revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初九]][[zh:六月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初九]][[zh:六月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初九]][[zh:六月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初九]][[zh:六月初九]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 9|qq=June 9}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 2 of {{ill|Chōkyō|en|Chōkyō|qid=Q968843|lt=Chōkyō (Japan)|1=Chōkyō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|qid=Q2729|lt=July 17|1=July 17}} , {{ill|1488|en|1488|qid=Q4853|lt=1488|1=1488}} ) – During the {{ill|Kaga ikki|en|Kaga ikki|qid=Q20982977|lt=Kaga Ikkō-ikki|1=Kaga ikki}} , the {{ill|Ikkō-shū|en|Ikkō-shū|qid=Q5366010|lt=Ikkō sect|1=Ikkō-shū}} followers in {{ill|Kaga|en|Kaga|qid=Q248153|lt=Kaga Province|1=Kaga}} attack and force the self-inflicted death of Governor {{ill|Togashi Masachika|en|Togashi Masachika|qid=Q11457018|lt=Togashi Masachika|1=Togashi Masachika}} . * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}} , {{ill|1853|en|1853|qid=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} ) – The {{ill|Uraga bugyō|ja|浦賀奉行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uraga bugyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遠国奉行|1=Ongoku-bugyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17171698}} meets with {{ill|Matthew C. Perry|en|Matthew C. Perry|qid=Q61855|lt=Matthew Perry (naval officer)|1=Matthew C. Perry}} and receives a letter from the U.S. president.
== Births == * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiwa (Japan)|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1146161}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|qid=Q2698|lt=July 4|1=July 4}} , {{ill|1767|en|1767|qid=Q7672|lt=1767|1=1767}} ) – {{ill|Takizawa Bakin|en|Takizawa Bakin|qid=Q463142|lt=Kyokutei Bakin|1=Takizawa Bakin}} (Takizawa Bakin), novelist (d. {{ill|1848|en|1848|qid=Q7647|lt=1848|1=1848}} ). * Year 7 of {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 5|en|July 5|qid=Q2696|lt=July 5|1=July 5}} , {{ill|1824|en|1824|qid=Q6994|lt=1824|1=1824}} ) – {{ill|Motoki Shōzō|ja|本木昌造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motoki Shōzō|1=Motoki Shōzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11518618}} , pioneer of Western-style printing in Japan (d. {{ill|1875|en|1875|qid=Q7764|lt=1875|1=1875}} ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 20|en|July 20|qid=Q2728|lt=July 20|1=July 20}} , {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} ) – {{ill|Chūhachi Ninomiya|en|Chūhachi Ninomiya|qid=Q3655885|lt=Ninomiya Chūhachi|1=Chūhachi Ninomiya}} , aviation pioneer in Japan (d. {{ill|1936|en|1936|qid=Q18649|lt=1936|1=1936}} ).
== Deaths == * (Julian calendar {{ill|June 28|en|June 28|qid=Q2660|lt=June 28|1=June 28}} , {{ill|1194|en|1194|qid=Q19743|lt=1194|1=1194}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Xiaozong of Song|ja|趙慎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Xiaozong of Song|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 孝宗 (宋)|1=Emperor Xiaozong of Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7492}} (Xiaozong), 2nd emperor of the {{ill|Southern Song dynasty|ja|南宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Song dynasty|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=南宋|qid=Q1147043}} (b. {{ill|1127|en|1127|qid=Q23827|lt=1127|1=1127}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|8|6|10|5|9|7|6|0609|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
